C:\w64devkit\bin\ar.exe qc libdove9.a "CMakeFiles/dove9.dir/utils/dove9-logger.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/dove9.dir/cognitive/dove9-triadic-engine.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/dove9.dir/cognitive/dove9-dte-processor.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/dove9.dir/integration/dove9-mail-protocol-bridge.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/dove9.dir/core/dove9-kernel.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/dove9.dir/integration/dove9-orchestrator-bridge.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/dove9.dir/integration/dove9-sys6-mail-scheduler.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/dove9.dir/integration/dove9-sys6-orchestrator-bridge.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/dove9.dir/dove9-system.c.obj"
C:\w64devkit\bin\ranlib.exe libdove9.a
